revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Family tree of Japanese deities); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1206467150 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Family tree of Japanese deities | revid=1206467150 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|shinto=y|myth=y|needs-attention=Yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology}} {{WikiProject Lists|class=C}} {{WikiProject Genealogy|importance=Mid}} }}
== Incomplete article ==
I just realized this article is extremely incomplete. I know there are more deities out there in Japanese mythology.[[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 18:57, 15 October 2021 (UTC)
:@[[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] I added a lot to it. Do you know more things to add to id? [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 01:25, 24 March 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Proposed merge of [[Three generations of Hyuga]] into [[Family tree of Japanese deities]] ==
Smaller portion of larger article [[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] ([[User talk:Kazamzam|talk]]) 16:59, 15 June 2022 (UTC)
:@[[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] I think the article is best merged somewhere else than here. It is about a portion of history in [[Japanese mythology]] between [[Tenson kōrin]] and '''{{ill|Jimmu's Eastern Expedition|ja|神武東征}}.''' :I made this family tree part into a template that I think should be used on a lot of the articles linked. :{{Three generations of Hyuga}} :[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] 💗 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 04:46, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
@[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] If you made the template and linked it to the pertinent articles then I think the article should be deleted and we can just keep the template, as all of its information is now in separate places. [[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] ([[User talk:Kazamzam|talk]]) 13:48, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
:@[[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] I did that. The debate now is just where to redirect the article to. I will redirect it to [[Tenson kōrin]] and merge the content if you have no issues with it [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] 💗 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 13:55, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
@[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] what I said was 'the article should be deleted', not merged. The content is already merged - I think it is fine to move it to a redirect but I think the likelihood of someone searching for 'three generations of Hyuga' are unlikely so it may not be necessary. [[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] ([[User talk:Kazamzam|talk]]) 13:57, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
:It's heavily linked on Japanese Wikipedia so I see it as well within the range of possibility [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] 💗 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 14:16, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Saving this revision as one to potentially go back to ==
In the event the merge messes up this is a revision that has everything mostly preserved to start fresh from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Family_tree_of_Japanese_deities&oldid=1146132764 [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 23:37, 22 March 2023 (UTC)
:Revision worked [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 01:25, 24 March 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>JJMC89 bot III]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Family_tree_of_Japanese_deities here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Family_tree_of_Japanese_deities for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1206467150 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Family tree of Japanese deities | revid=1206467150 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|shinto=y|myth=y|needs-attention=Yes}} {{WikiProject Mythology}} {{WikiProject Lists|class=C}} {{WikiProject Genealogy|importance=Mid}} }}
== Incomplete article ==
I just realized this article is extremely incomplete. I know there are more deities out there in Japanese mythology.[[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] ([[User talk:CycoMa|talk]]) 18:57, 15 October 2021 (UTC)
:@[[User:CycoMa|CycoMa]] I added a lot to it. Do you know more things to add to id? [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 01:25, 24 March 2023 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Proposed merge of [[Three generations of Hyuga]] into [[Family tree of Japanese deities]] ==
Smaller portion of larger article [[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] ([[User talk:Kazamzam|talk]]) 16:59, 15 June 2022 (UTC)
:@[[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] I think the article is best merged somewhere else than here. It is about a portion of history in [[Japanese mythology]] between [[Tenson kōrin]] and '''{{ill|Jimmu's Eastern Expedition|ja|神武東征}}.''' :I made this family tree part into a template that I think should be used on a lot of the articles linked. :{{Three generations of Hyuga}} :[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] 💗 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 04:46, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
@[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] If you made the template and linked it to the pertinent articles then I think the article should be deleted and we can just keep the template, as all of its information is now in separate places. [[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] ([[User talk:Kazamzam|talk]]) 13:48, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
:@[[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] I did that. The debate now is just where to redirect the article to. I will redirect it to [[Tenson kōrin]] and merge the content if you have no issues with it [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] 💗 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 13:55, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
@[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] what I said was 'the article should be deleted', not merged. The content is already merged - I think it is fine to move it to a redirect but I think the likelihood of someone searching for 'three generations of Hyuga' are unlikely so it may not be necessary. [[User:Kazamzam|Kazamzam]] ([[User talk:Kazamzam|talk]]) 13:57, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
:It's heavily linked on Japanese Wikipedia so I see it as well within the range of possibility [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] 💗 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(please tag me)]] 14:16, 16 June 2022 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Saving this revision as one to potentially go back to ==
In the event the merge messes up this is a revision that has everything mostly preserved to start fresh from https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Family_tree_of_Japanese_deities&oldid=1146132764 [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 23:37, 22 March 2023 (UTC)
:Revision worked [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 01:25, 24 March 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:21, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
